justification: Both extractions identify the same 14 skills accurately and set experience_level to recent_graduate. However, A is dramatically superior on project_classification and impact_quality. A correctly classifies InternTracker as 'Full-Stack Web App' and PricePulse as 'Data Engineering / ETL', and captures all seven concrete impact highlights with specific metrics (1.8s load reduction, 62% query improvement, 22k MAU, 500+ users in 2 weeks, $5,000 prize, 80% cache reduction, 10k+ daily requests). B extracts no projects and no impact highlights at all, scoring neutral (3) on both dimensions by default. A is the clear winner.
